note: PDG eq.34.5 dE/dx for Al at KE=1 MeV (antiproton); selftest anchor #1. hexa<->Python substrate parity, relerr 7.8e-11. Units MeV*cm^2/g. Stage-3 GREEN (absorbed=false: omits 4 Geant4-MC corrections).
PDG eq.34.5 dE/dx for Al at KE=1 GeV (antiproton); selftest anchor #2. relerr 2.7e-10. Units MeV*cm^2/g.
PDG eq.34.5 dE/dx for Pb at KE=100 MeV (antiproton); selftest anchor #3. relerr 9.6e-11. Units MeV*cm^2/g.
PDG eq.34.5 dE/dx for Pb at KE=1 GeV (antiproton); selftest anchor #4 (the worst-case residual, relerr 4.07e-10 -> body's '<= 4e-10' headline). Units MeV*cm^2/g.

Cold non-relativistic wave-breaking (Dawson) field E_0 = m_e c omega_p / e at n_e=1e18 cm^-3, in GV/m. Literature engineering coeff E_0[V/m] ~ 96*sqrt(n_e[cm^-3]) reproduced (96.159 vs 96.0, <0.2%). hexa-lang PR #1007.
Plasma wavelength lambda_p = 2*pi*c/omega_p at n_e=1e18 cm^-3, in microns. Literature coeff lambda_p[um]*sqrt(n_e[cm^-3]) ~ 3.34e10 reproduced (3.339e10 vs 3.34e10, <0.05%). hexa-lang PR #1007.

FBPIC 0.27.0 axisymmetric (Nm=2) moving-window PIC, a0=0.1 (linear), n_e=1e18 cm^-3, grid Nz=512 Nr=40, 1792 steps, pool ubu-1 CPU/numba (no paid compute). On-axis Ez zero-crossing period lambda_p_PIC=32.200 um vs closed-form lambda_p=33.389 um -> Delta=3.562%. Ez_peak=38.65 MV/m, E_peak/E_0=4.0e-4 (linear-regime check). hexa-lang PR #1088 (+124/-4).

Xsuite 0.51.1 FODO twiss beta_x_max vs Wiedemann §6.2 / Lee §7.4 thick-quad closed form. rel err 2.7e-14 (beta_x_max), 4.1e-14 (q_x) -- far inside the 1e-6 parity tolerance. absorbed=true ALGORITHM closure (optics-only; textbook cell, 7 TeV proton; no measured ring). A measured-tune flip needs a sourced ring deck (downstream).
Xsuite 0.51.1 FODO cell tune q_x vs Wiedemann/Lee thick-quad closed form, rel err 4.1e-14. Companion to xsuite_fodo_beta_x_max; same absorbed=true ALGORITHM closure caveat.

pylhe 1.0.4 synthetic e+e- -> Z -> mu+mu- @ sqrt(s)=91.1876 GeV, 100 events (rng_seed 20260520). Total final-state energy 9118.76 GeV = 100 events x 91.1876 GeV (per-event 4-momentum conservation). absorbed=false GATE_OPEN PERMANENT: synthetic kinematics (not tuned MC), no detector simulation -> not comparable to ATLAS/CMS. Parser round-trip single-point, not a physics claim.

PDG eq.34.6 piecewise Sternheimer-Berger-Seltzer 1984 density-effect delta(beta*gamma) at Al / beta*gamma=0.46. Cross-check vs. PDG-tabulated reference; libm-class roundoff floor. Stage-5 closed-form correction atom #1 (hexa-lang #1296).

Andersen-Ziegler 1977 universal shell-correction C(I,bg)/Z at Cu / bg=2.55 (eta in calibrated regime eta>=0.13). Round-tolerant within --tol 1e-5 (libm constant-fold floor). Stage-5 closed-form correction atom #2 (hexa-lang #1296).
Bloch 1933 z^2 Born-correction in the form of Ahlen 1980 eq.2.34. Antiproton |z|=1 -> beta-only dependence. Round-tolerant within --tol 1e-6. Stage-5 closed-form correction atom #3 (hexa-lang #1296).
Ashley-Ritchie-Brandt 1972 z1^3 universal F(beta*gamma) (Sigmund 2006 sec 3.4) with antiproton z1=-1 sign-flip. libm-class roundoff. Stage-5 closed-form correction atom #4 (hexa-lang #1296).
